MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT J. H.'S DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant J.H.'s Demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint ("SAC") is overruled as untimely. The SAC was filed June 28, 2021. Plaintiff gave J.H. extensions to respond through August 6, but J.H. did not demur until September 1. The Court has discretion to consider the late-filed demurrer or not. (McAllister v. County of Monterey, 147 Cal.App.4th 253, 281-82.) Rather than delay this case further with shadow boxing over two counts of a 12-count SAC, I opt for the latter course.

Order is signed.
